title: Drafting Orbit Field
prompt:
Create a production-ready Drafting Orbit Field using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a subtle decorative background for a content panel: pale drafting rings and coordinate ticks sit behind a small control that lets the reader choose one of three orbit positions. The selected position moves a single violet locator dot along the rings and changes a short caption, while the background remains quiet enough for foreground content. Use a very light #F4F5F6 canvas, white foreground tile, #ECECEE lines, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Violet is the only bright accent. The white card must not use a gradient.

Use a labelled group of semantic buttons with aria-pressed and a polite live region for the current orbit label. Click, Enter, and Space choose the same position. Each button needs a 44px target and a visible 3px dark focus ring. Hover lifts a control 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Move only the locator dot with a spring of stiffness 280 and damping 24; opacity-fade its caption over 160ms. The rings are static CSS geometry, not an image, and must never obscure text. Use local state only with no timers, random values, storage, remote assets, or network calls.

At 320px, the foreground tile should stay readable and controls must wrap. At wider detail previews, let the field breathe without adding noisy decoration. Maintain AA contrast, logical keyboard order, and text state beyond color. Prefer transform and opacity. Respect prefers-reduced-motion with an immediate locator move or 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
*/ .uiwiki-orbit{position:relative;max-width:340px;padding:20px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#f4f5f6}.uiwiki-orbit:before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:28px;border:1px solid #d9d9dc;border-radius:50%}.uiwiki-orbit div{position:relative;padding:16px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:16px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-orbit button{min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-orbit button[aria-pressed="true"]{border-color:#7c3aed}.uiwiki-orbit button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-orbit *{transition:none}}
